title: Rick Valassi
summary: A reporter and broadcaster who remains on the air after the events of the first game.

claims.text: The official story recap describes Rick Valassi as a reporter and broadcaster.
Following the events of The Division, Valassi remains active and continues broadcasting.

paragraphs.text: Valassi represents the continuing media voice that survives beyond the first New York crisis, although this overview does not yet catalog his individual broadcasts.

verification.notes: Broadcast-by-broadcast coverage belongs to the collectible intake and speaker-review workflow.
